TestCase z15Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n1 < 2
    if (follow_case.n1 < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to swap distinct items, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: swap two random distinct elements in data1
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n1;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n1;
    while (idx2 == idx1) {
        idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n1;
    }
    double temp = follow_case.data1[idx1];
    follow_case.data1[idx1] = follow_case.data1[idx2];
    follow_case.data1[idx2] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
